title: Spicy Argentinian Velvety Steak Fries
description: A fusion of Argentinian and spicy flavors served with velvety fries for a delicious twist.
instructions: 2. Slice the Argentinian pepper steak into thin strips.
3. In a bowl, mix together the spicy stir fry sauce and velvety fry sauce.
4. Toss the fries in the sauce mixture until they are fully coated.
5. Bake the fries in the oven for 20-25 minutes or until crispy.
6. Grill or pan-fry the steak strips until cooked through.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Serve the steak strips with the crispy fries and spoon some of the velvety fry sauce on top.
